description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with two distinct upper-level sections, each accessible by its own set of stairs leading to a shared balcony. The structure is elevated above a wooden platform, with the main living area supported by columns and an overhanging roof that provides shade. The roof is flat with raised rectangular skylight structures, adding a contemporary touch. The front facade is open, with railings and visible staircases, while the rear is more enclosed with large, solid panels. The exterior is finished in a combination of reddish-brown and white tones, with wood-textured flooring on the platform. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open balcony spaces, and a functional, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, elevated house with two upper-level sections, flat roof skylights, and a shared balcony accessed by stairs. The exterior features reddish-brown and white tones with a wood-textured platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing two staircases leading to a shared balcony, open railings, and the main entry points to the upper sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the overhanging roof, and the profile of the stairs and balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two large, solid panels and the enclosed back of the house, with minimal openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the house, the stairs, and the solid rear panels.
attribute_entryway_design: Dual staircases leading to a shared balcony with open railings and a covered entry, minimal decorative elements.
